label: 渲染预处理
description: 按照渲染顺序对网格列表和名称清单进行重排与合并：tile类型按顺序累积（后面的tile会包含前面所有tile的区域），asset类型排在末尾，输出重排后的网格列表与名称清单。
description-en: Reorders and merges grid list and name list according to render order: tile types are accumulated (each tile includes all previous tiles' areas), asset types are placed at the end, outputs reordered grid list and name list.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标，图层叠加排序，左侧多张彩色网格，右侧按顺序叠加的网格，主色为蓝绿和金色，简洁现代。

inputs.name: inputGridList
inputs.label: 网格列表
inputs.description: 输入的01网格列表，与名称清单一一对应
inputs.description-en: Input binary grid list, one-to-one correspondence with name list.

inputs.name: nameList
inputs.label: 名称清单
inputs.description: 名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]，type为tile或asset
inputs.description-en: Name list with entries {id, name, type}, type is 'tile' or 'asset'.

inputs.name: renderOrder
inputs.label: 渲染顺序
inputs.description: JSON字符串，格式如 ["浅水","中水",["草地","浓草地"],"山地"]，[]内为平级关系
inputs.description-en: JSON string, e.g. ["water","deep_water",["grass","thick_grass"],"mountain"], [] means same level.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 网格列表
outputs.description: 按渲染顺序重排并累积合并后的网格列表，asset排在末尾
outputs.description-en: Grid list reordered and accumulated by render order, assets placed at end.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 按渲染顺序重排后的名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]
outputs.description-en: Name list reordered by render order, format [{id, name, type}].
